name: Raspberry Almond Shortbread Thumbprints
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, butter, and almond extract. Beat at medium speed until creamy (about 1-2 minutes). Reduce speed to low; add flour. Continue beating until well mixed (about 1-2 minutes).
Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Place them 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. With the tips of your thumb, make indentation in center of each cookie (edges may crack slightly). Fill each indentation with about 1/4 teaspoon jam.
Bake for 14 to 18 minutes or until edges are lightly browned. Let stand on cookie sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool.
In a small bowl, stir together powdered sugar and 1 1/2 teaspoons almond extract. Gradually stir in enough water to make a thin glaze. Drizzle over cooled cookies.
